SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND; PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLEADED FACTS CREATING A DUTY ON THE LANDLORD. THE LAW DOES NOT IMPOSE ON A LANDLORD THE DUTY TO INVOLVE ITSELF IN A LESSEE'S BUSINESS TO THE EXTENT SUGGESTED BY PLAINTIFF IN THE ABSENCE OF FACTS SUCH AS PRIOR INCIDENTS GIVING RISE TO HEIGHTENED FEASEABILITY OF THIRD-PARTY CRIMINAL CONDUCT. calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as assigned by Dept. of the PJ. this day for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: K. Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maria Viscio #12353.

Brian Gearinger, Esq. and Joseph May, Esq. appeared for and with the plaintiffs Shawn Choy and Kayla Cha, were placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Live SF Entertainment, Inc.
At plaintiffs' request in open court, all others remaining defendants in this case were dismissed.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Total Judgment for Plaintiff Choy in the amount of $3,269,951.92 and Total Judgment for Plaintiff Cha in the amount of $1,952,420.89 (see scanned doc. for break down and details of the judgment.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2011 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS JOHN SZE CHOW AND MICHELE CHOW AS TRUSTEES OF THE REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 11/28/94'S DEMURRER TO 2ND. AMENDED COMPLAINT.
SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND; PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLEADED FACTS CREATING A DUTY ON THE LANDLORD. THE LAW DOES NOT IMPOSE ON A LANDLORD THE DUTY TO INVOLVE ITSELF IN A LESSEE'S BUSINESS TO THE EXTENT SUGGESTED BY PLAINTIFF IN THE ABSENCE OF FACTS SUCH AS PRIOR INCIDENTS GIVING RISE TO HEIGHTENED FEASEABILITY OF THIRD-PARTY CRIMINAL CONDUCT. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB)
